content_body: We had a wonderful Thanksgiving! The view from Fallen Timber Lodge was just beautiful. We loved the openness of the cabin, and the decor was very unique. In the morning, we would see a bald eagle fly down the Toccoa River. We enjoyed being able to have a fire in the rock fireplace! We kept talking about going into Blue Ridge for shopping and the Christmas Parade, but we just relaxed and hung around the cabin. We enjoyed watching the train pass along the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway. Happy holidays in 2014!
title: Family Holiday
